scope: Master matrix comparing current repo knowledge, local private-reference lessons, zip-reference lessons, and official Salesforce documentation research.

overall_current_repo_coverage_score.label: medium overall with several high-risk weak spots
overall_current_repo_coverage_score.method: Forty topics scored with none=0, weak=1, medium=2, strong=3 based on existing repo index, file inventory, term coverage, and prior gap reports.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Broad Apex guidance exists, but service/controller examples can still miss newer security, idempotency, and callout-boundary expectations.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add a concise Apex class decision matrix for service, controller, selector, integration, and async boundaries, with security posture called out.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Codex may fix trigger symptoms without checking order of execution, Flow interactions, recursion scope, delete/undelete behavior, or bulk safety.
topics.recommended_improvement: Create official-backed trigger guidance for handler shape, changed-field checks, recursion guards, order of execution, Flow interactions, and bulk tests.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Deploys may pass local smoke tests but fail coverage, branch, permission, async, file, or communication-automation behavior in validation.
topics.recommended_improvement: Expand tests guidance for deploy-bound selected tests, async flushing, file tests, permission context, communication automation, and assertion quality.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Queueable, batch, scheduled, and future work may be chosen by habit instead of transaction, limits, retry, and observability needs.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add a selection table for future, queueable, batch, scheduled, platform-event, and direct synchronous paths, including test and idempotency rules.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Dynamic query work can produce injection risks, field-permission gaps, relationship null bugs, or limit failures.
topics.recommended_improvement: Strengthen dynamic SOQL/SOSL guidance around bind values, field allowlists, relationship fields, query plans, security, and limit-aware tests.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: User-facing Apex or LWC may appear correct while bypassing object access, field access, record sharing, or user-mode expectations.
topics.recommended_improvement: Create a security matrix separating sharing keywords, CRUD/FLS, user mode, system mode, strip-inaccessible behavior, LDS/UI API, and exposed Apex.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Basic component guidance is solid, but can drift unless cross-linked to official component metadata and template rules.
topics.recommended_improvement: Keep existing basics, add small official-source cross-links, and ensure new advanced LWC pages do not duplicate base guidance.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Components may misuse wire data, imperative Apex, cache invalidation, dynamic fields, navigation, toasts, and refresh behavior.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add decision tables for LDS/UI API versus wire Apex versus imperative Apex, plus dynamic-field and cache-refresh rules.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Desktop-responsive fixes may fail in the Salesforce mobile app for camera, file preview, overlays, navigation, action placement, and webview timing.
topics.recommended_improvement: Expand mobile runtime rules for real-device proof, action placement, camera lifecycle, file handoff, overlay cleanup, and mobile validation claims.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Codex may overbuild Aura or miss Aura-to-LWC boundary constraints in older orgs.
topics.recommended_improvement: Keep Aura as maintenance-oriented guidance and add a short LWC-preferred decision note with Aura wrapper boundaries.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Legacy page work may break stable controller contracts, action routing, or Lightning/mobile launch behavior.
topics.recommended_improvement: Clarify Visualforce maintenance stance, controller-extension review, Lightning launch paths, sanitization, and regression checks.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Generated PDFs can regress because PDF rendering has constrained CSS/resource/page-break behavior and mobile/file handoff edge cases.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add warning-heavy PDF guidance for stable markup, resources, long text, blank data, sanitization, Files handoff, and visual comparison.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Broad metadata docs exist, but high-risk type behavior can still be overgeneralized across source format, metadata API, and UI activation.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add metadata-type-specific warnings and cross-links to coverage, source format, activation, and release validation.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: A component may deploy cleanly but remain invisible due to activation, visibility rules, form factor, permissions, or page assignment.
topics.recommended_improvement: Expand FlexiPage activation and visibility chain guidance with official metadata checks and record-page troubleshooting flow.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Layout, Dynamic Forms, compact layout, and action-list changes can be made in the wrong layer.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add a layout-versus-FlexiPage-versus-Dynamic-Forms decision guide and update record-page validation checks.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Action visibility bugs may be misdiagnosed as LWC bugs when the actual problem is target config, layout, Dynamic Actions, overflow, mobile form factor, or permissions.
topics.recommended_improvement: Create a quick action visibility matrix covering metadata, layout, Highlights Panel, Dynamic Actions, activation, form factor, and permission state.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Broad profile or permission changes can leak access, cause unrelated metadata churn, or fail to expose Apex/classes/components to users.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add a permission-change checklist for object, field, class, tab, app, custom permission, external user, and profile-vs-permission-set choices.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: File features can mishandle upload, preview, latest version, delete/relink, refresh, public access, or portal authorization.
topics.recommended_improvement: Create a Files lifecycle guide and expand existing file handling with refresh, security, portal/mobile, generated document, and cleanup rules.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Codex may treat a Salesforce File as one row, causing stale rollups, wrong latest-version handling, bad access assumptions, or delete/relink bugs.
topics.recommended_improvement: Document the three-object lifecycle, latest-version queries, link behavior, sharing, and test data constraints.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Email automation may duplicate activity, expose private bodies in logs, misuse merge data, or fail across environments and external users.
topics.recommended_improvement: Create communication automation guidance covering templates, email services, message logging, idempotency, threading, permission context, and public-safe logs.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Automated posts and mentions may fail because actor context, body segments, mention offsets, permissions, and duplicate prevention are not documented.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add Chatter and ConnectApi rules for post body construction, mentions, actor context, idempotency, permission checks, and sanitized logging.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Address saves may fail or lose structure when code writes root compound fields, omits required country/state code pairing, or parses formatted text as source of truth.
topics.recommended_improvement: Create dedicated compound address rules for Apex, LWC forms, validation, structured leaf fields, partial addresses, and map/street-view links.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Configuration-dependent features may fail silently when custom metadata is absent, stale, or treated as a secret store.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add explicit CMDT usage rules for feature flags, default configuration, missing-record behavior, tests, and no-secret policy.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Integration guidance may hardcode endpoints or secrets, miss external credential principal access, or publish sensitive configuration.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add a named credential and external credential model covering endpoint, authentication, principals, permission assignment, callout tests, and secret non-publication.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Report and dashboard metadata can expose private names or break deployments due to folders, dependencies, filters, and source-format structure.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add report/dashboard metadata safety notes, folder dependency checks, and public-sanitization warnings.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Portal-facing files, components, and Apex can accidentally assume internal-user permissions or client-side authorization.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add a portal safety section for guest/external users, server-side file access checks, navigation, record access, and mobile/browser differences.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Codex may run stale `sfdx` examples, wrong `sf` flags, or mutating commands without local help verification.
topics.recommended_improvement: Update command maps with an official-source verification queue and require installed CLI help before mutating or deployment commands.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Metadata deletion can remove the wrong component, hide dependencies, or combine irreversible cleanup with unrelated feature work.
topics.recommended_improvement: Create a standalone destructive deployment runbook with target list, dependency check, validation-only command, rollback notes, and explicit approval gates.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Manifests may become too broad, omit dependencies, include private metadata, or misrepresent source-format paths.
topics.recommended_improvement: Expand package manifest notes with narrow scope, dependency review, metadata coverage checks, and destructive manifest separation.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Tool docs can drift toward retired scanner behavior, wrong command names, or unverified rule/engine parameters.
topics.recommended_improvement: Align Code Analyzer documentation with official v5 docs first, then keep upstream GitHub as secondary implementation context.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Jest guidance can overclaim validation or miss wire adapter mocks, DOM assertions, package-version behavior, and installed script checks.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add a small official-source alignment pass and require actual npm script execution before claiming LWC unit validation.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Lint guidance may miss installed package differences or confuse general ESLint with LWC-specific parser/template constraints.
topics.recommended_improvement: Keep current coverage and add a short command-verification note tied to project-local npm scripts and installed config.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Formatting guidance may be mistaken for official Salesforce behavior or run without checking project-local formatter versions.
topics.recommended_improvement: Keep Prettier Apex as optional non-authoritative tooling and document missing-tool behavior, version checks, and no-semantic-change expectations.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Raw logs may be published, sensitive values may leak, or Codex may treat logs as root cause without permission/runtime context.
topics.recommended_improvement: Create debug-log triage rules for trace setup, log level, symptom extraction, sanitization, retention, and evidence-based summaries.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Validation may use the wrong test level, overly broad source scope, stale CLI flags, or incomplete evidence before a real deploy.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add a validation evidence flow for command, target org alias, source or manifest scope, test level, result, and follow-up checks.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Private-derived lessons, logs, screenshots, generated reports, email bodies, file names, and local state may leak into public docs.
topics.recommended_improvement: Expand public-safety checks with local-reference extraction, zip artifact, generated output, communication artifact, and debug-log categories.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Future tasks may lose high-value lessons, repeat past mistakes, or write private reference details into persistent memory/history.
topics.recommended_improvement: Keep current memory/history prompts and add a public-safe note for private-derived lessons: summarize lessons, never store sensitive facts.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Apex, trigger, async, file, and test guidance may miss the platform limit reason behind bulkification and transaction design.
topics.recommended_improvement: Add limit-risk warnings tied to triggers, async, SOQL, DML, callouts, Files, tests, and dynamic query patterns without copying numeric tables.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Codex may edit Apex or LWC without checking Flow callers, invocable contracts, screen-flow hosts, or order-of-execution side effects.
topics.recommended_improvement: Document Flow as a first-class entry point for Apex, triggers, LWC, and record transactions, including invocable Apex and validation strategy.

topics.risk_if_not_improved: Codex may confuse source format, metadata format, package directories, local state, or scratch-org configuration.
topics.recommended_improvement: Tighten project-discovery and source-format guidance around sfdx-project files, package directories, force-app conventions, and ignored local state.

biggest_missing_areas: Security matrix for sharing, CRUD/FLS, user mode, system mode, LDS/UI API, and exposed Apex
Dedicated communication automation guidance for email, activity, Chatter, ConnectApi, mentions, idempotency, and public-safe logging
Destructive deployment runbook and package/destructive manifest separation
Salesforce Files lifecycle guidance for ContentDocument, ContentVersion, ContentDocumentLink, latest versions, portal access, and refresh
Compound address field rules for Apex, LWC, validation, and state/country picklists
Flow-aware trigger and LWC/Apex interaction rules
Governor-limit warning model tied to practical Codex decisions
recommended_next_prompt: Using WORKSPACE/MASTER_KNOWLEDGE_GAP_MATRIX.md, WORKSPACE/MASTER_KNOWLEDGE_GAP_MATRIX.json, and WORKSPACE/IMPROVEMENT_BATCH_PLAN.md, draft Batch 1 P0 Salesforce technical gap updates into WORKSPACE/proposed_knowledge_updates/ only. Cover security matrix, Apex trigger/order-of-execution rules, Apex test improvements, Files lifecycle, destructive deployment safety, Code Analyzer v5 alignment, deployment validation, debug-log triage, governor-limit warnings, compound address rules, and communication automation. Do not modify SALESFORCE_KNOWLEDGE yet, do not commit, and do not push.
